args: export CADENCE_CODE_HOST=antigravity; for root in "${extensionPath}" "$PWD" "$HOME/.gemini/antigravity-cli/plugins/cadence-code"; do bootstrap="$root/bin/cadence-code-mcp-bootstrap"; if [ -x "$bootstrap" ]; then exec bash "$bootstrap"; fi; done; echo "[cadence-code] ERROR: could not locate bin/cadence-code-mcp-bootstrap." >&2; exit 1
